---
title: "Instructor Intervention Plan"
---

## Level 1: Light-Touch Check-In (Early Signal)

Trigger examples:

- A group reports “2 – Somewhat uneven” for two consecutive weeks
- One student consistently reports vague or minimal contributions

What I will do: 

- Send a brief email to the group
- Summarize the pattern neutrally
- Ask your group to clarify how tasks are being assigned
- Encourage more explicit ownership rotation

**No grade impact at this stage**

## Level 2: Structured Reset Conversation

Trigger examples:

- Repeated uneven workload ratings (3+ weeks)
- Consistent reports of unequal contribution
- Communication concerns appearing in multiple surveys

What I will do: 

- Require a short meeting (10–15 minutes) where I ask your group to:
  * Explain how they divide tasks
  * Describe how decisions are made
  * Propose a revised division plan for the next two weeks

- Possibly require a written task allocation plan

**Individual grades may be modified at this stage.**

## Level 3: Individual Accountability Adjustment

Trigger examples:

- Clear, documented pattern of under-contribution
- Peer reports align across multiple weeks
- If you do not respond to my communication(s)

What I will do:

- Meet with you individually
- Clarify expectations
- Document performance concerns

**Individual grades will be modified at this stage.**
